batch_endpoint_confusion.likely_safe_improvement: Audit batch endpoint family labels and alias repair diagnostics.

broad_domain_api_confusion.likely_safe_improvement: Add endpoint-family labels and confidence diagnostics for broad platform/API intents.

low_confidence.likely_safe_improvement: Use broader context and surface the uncertainty to LLM/controller paths instead of narrowing aggressively.

missing_gold_api_in_top_k.likely_safe_improvement: Improve endpoint catalog descriptions and API-family aliases without using public answer patterns.

missing_gold_table_in_top_k.likely_safe_improvement: Audit schema aliases and structural bridge coverage using schema-level signals only.

schema_vs_dataset_confusion.likely_safe_improvement: Clarify schema-vs-dataset table/API affordances in retrieval-only metadata.

tag_api_confusion.likely_safe_improvement: Strengthen tag endpoint summaries and keep dry-run API evidence labeled separately.

zero_score_margin.likely_safe_improvement: Improve tie-break diagnostics or fall back to hybrid/full schema context; do not force a table choice from a tied score.
